system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You enter a brief state of resting mediation and build up dangerous levels of internal powers to deliver a lethal blow that sends a shockwave through the body, and can blast the heart or other internal organs. You can choose to meditate for longer periods to build up massive energies. Spend one round to make a Meditation Skill roll against TN 9 (-1 per Rank of Neigong). On a Success, you summon enough internal strength to deliver 1 Extra Wound on your next Arm Strike Attack (provided it is made within one minute after you stop using this Technique). You may also choose to attempt this Technique in the next round (see below). On a Failure, you disrupt your own Qi and take the number of Extra Wounds the Attack would have inflicted. If you wish, you can choose to repeat this process each subsequent round, rolling Meditation against the TN as usual. You can continue to do this up to a number of total rounds equal to your Qi level or until you fail a Meditation roll. For each additional Success, you add one additional Extra Wound to your next Arm Strike. Cathartic: This has two important alterations to the basic Technique. First, once you have successfully used this Technique, you automatically succeed on your Meditation roll on each subsequent round that you choose to build up energy. It also allows you to build up internal strength for a total number of rounds equal to twice your Qi level (to a max of 12), allowing you to do 12 Extra Wounds if you Meditate for 12 rounds.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: This has two important alterations to the basic Technique. First, once you have successfully used this Technique, you automatically succeed on your Meditation roll on each subsequent round that you choose to build up energy. It also allows you to build up internal strength for a total number of rounds equal to twice your Qi level (to a max of 12), allowing you to do 12 Extra Wounds if you Meditate for 12 rounds.
